translated: I didn't think Tomari would ever wear an outfit that went so all-in on being cute.
it might not happen, so I feel like this is a new change for Tomari herself.
It's like, because she fell in love with school idols, she can now show a side of herself she never could before, and the outfit reflects that.
I'm so glad she got to wear something so cute.
I want like, three of these for my house... this, this...
Like a figure! But seriously, it's so cute.
I'm so happy they even included that playing card cat embroidery.
The visuals on the screen were amazing too.
They put so much detail into it. Thank you so much, really.
I want to watch just that part again.
I'm so happy to hear that.
And Tomari-chan... Sakun's expression was also very, very, very wonderful.
I'm so happy. I can't thank you enough.
We have to move on to the next one.
Next is from Liella name: K1.
Great job on the Love Live! Superstar!! Liella! 7th LoveLive! Fly and High!! Music World Kanagawa performance.
I was there to see it in person both days.
The song that personally left an impression on me was the second one, "UTOPIA MAGIC."
I felt the lyrics in the chorus about "casting a spell on the usual scenery" fit the theme of this concert perfectly.
With the different hairstyles and the new performance structure, even small changes made it feel as fresh as if I were seeing it for the first time.
Next, we have one from Liella name: Kubo-san.
I attended the Liella! 7th LoveLive! Fly and High!! Music World Kanagawa performance.
"UTOPIA MAGIC" was performed for the first time since the 3rd Live, wasn't it?
I wasn't able to attend the 3rd Live,
so I was so happy I accidentally let out a shout the moment the intro started playing.
Since it was performed on stage this time,
the choreography for the chorus especially left a lasting impression.
I love the cute choreography, like making heart shapes with your hands and walking energetically.
We had both the low and high voices there.
But man, it was great having that as the second song.
In recent Liella! lives, the second song has usually been something like "Let's do this!"
Songs with a lot of grit and energy.
I totally get what you mean.
